name: sdd-review-loop
description: [internal] Run independent implementation and task decomposition review loops for sdd-bootstrap.

interface.shortDescription: Review SDD designs and task decompositions
interface.longDescription: Internal dependency of sdd-bootstrap. Runs independent implementation-policy and task-decomposition review loops before human approval.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the sdd-bootstrap skill to prepare a specification; it invokes the required review loop.
